name: Secure the Senate
subject: “neck and neck” (The Hill)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
| "**Toomey and McGinty 's race could help determine which party controls the majority in the upper chamber**... Toomey holds a significant cash advantage over McGinty. But in a recent survey... **the two were neck and neck.** " \-- _The Hill_
[**We can win this, friend! Will you pitch in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2700287432674246656/2290947925192212480?refcode=e20160529&refcode2=e20160529nd&amount=25)
---
Friend-- _The Hill_ says it all. Yes, Pat Toomey has a lot more cash in his war chest than we ever will. **But we have the momentum -- and the stronger grassroots network.** That's why **Katie has JUMPED in the polls this month to tie Toomey.**

Over the next few months, we need to double our efforts to hold Toomey accountable for his record of putting his Wall Street cronies above Pennsylvania families.

And since we don't have Toomey's millions, we're relying on you to get it done. [**Will you pitch in today to help Katie win her race and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2700287432674246656/2290947925192212480?refcode=e20160529&refcode2=e20160529nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Secure the Senate
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2700287432674246656/2290947925192212480?refcode=e20160529&refcode2=e20160529nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2700287432674246656/2218890331154284544).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Gregg
subject: More circles than the Indy 500
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Can I count on you to help me get our state back to work? This election is so important for our future.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, This election is so important for our future. So when I take some time to spend with my family, like I did yesterday, I make sure to hit the ground running the very next day. That's why I'm emailing you so early today, and asking for your help to reach the final $7,023 of our critical fundraising goal by midnight tonight. **Can I count on you to help me get our state back to work by chipping in $5 now toward our May fundraising goal?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Express Donate: $5 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

[**Express Donate: $25 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=25)
---

[**Express Donate: $50 ** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=50)
---

[**Or, donate another amount** ](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Hoosiers are working very hard these days -- if they can find work -- but paychecks aren't keeping up.
That's why I'm working so hard to take Indiana in a better direction and put the best ideas from Republicans, Democrats, and Independents into action to create good-paying jobs.
But it's not enough for me to just work hard on the campaign trail -- to win this election we need resources. And hitting our $25,000 fundraising goal is critical to putting the right resources to work at the right time.
**[Will you chip in $5 now to help me raise the final $7,023 of our critical May fundraising goal -- before MIDNIGHT?](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**
Thanks for your support,
John Gregg

| [**Chip in $5 ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/629811907427436544/8857312231000770560?utm_campaign=fnd_mayeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160531_fnd_gq_mayeom_ndn_4_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

Indianapolis IN 46244 United States

name: Bill Clinton
subject: Show Hillary you’re with her before Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
pundits and prognosticators | Friend --

The campaign has a big fundraising deadline coming up on Tuesday -- the last one before primary voting concludes.

I know how much attention the pundits and prognosticators pay to these deadlines -- and how much it will mean to Hillary to know you’re going to help her finish this primary strong and become our party’s nominee.

**How about it? The campaign needs 16 people from your town to step up today to hit its goal for May, so chip in now, and show Hillary -- and the world -- that you’re with her:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Bill

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever.**

Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: Pending
Suggested donation by 5/31 deadline: **$1**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2MDY4MjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MzY5OTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

Friend --

Our amazing grassroots supporters have gotten us halfway to our end-of-month goal! What a great show of our momentum!

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3489346205681451008/-3761889973993734144?refcode=e20160529.2&refcode2=e20160529.2nd&amount=25)

**This is our time to defeat Pat Toomey and swing the Senate back to Blue. We have two days left. Every single donation makes a difference.[Will you pitch in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3489346205681451008/-3761889973993734144?refcode=e20160529.2&refcode2=e20160529.2nd&amount=25)**

Team Katie

name: JayInslee.com
subject: Trump and the RGA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
First Donald Trump targeted Washington, now the RGA.

Friend --

First: Donald Trump said he'd win Washington

Now: The Republican Governors Association and its super PACs, who turned Massachusetts and Maryland red, are headed to Washington

That all means one thing: Jay Inslee needs you now more than ever.

Goal: $50,000 by 5/31

JayInslee.com

name: Maggie for NH Polling Team
subject: statistical deadlock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd313/2a380d31/13cdbe98/f854fc/3825310411/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd313/2a380d31/13cdbe98/f854fc/3825310411/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd313/2a380d31/13cdbe98/f854fd/3825310411/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTI5X0VPTTNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160529_EOM3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500") Hey folks, it's Maggie's polling team checking in before Tuesday's deadline. We've looked at the polls, and we're taking the lead, but this **race is still a virtual tie** -- We've looked at the fundraising, and **we're falling short of our $50,000 goal.**
With control of the Senate, the future of the Supreme Court, and electing a Senator who will fight for Granite State families on the line, we HAVE to hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal or we risk poll numbers slipping away from us. [**Donate $3 directly to Maggie's campaign to help make sure we hit our fundraising goal, and keep up the momentum in the polls.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd313/2a380d31/13cdbe98/f854fd/3825310411/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTI5X0VPTTNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160529_EOM3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
This race is a statistical deadlock because Kelly Ayotte's corporate special interest allies have spent nearly $10 MILLION and they'll keep spending to make sure Maggie doesn't win. **We don't need to match them dollar-for-dollar, but Maggie is relying on grassroots supporters to give what you can to push back.[There's not much time left and we need you to give **$3** or more to hit our goal before time runs out.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd313/2a380d31/13cdbe98/f854fd/3825310411/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTI5X0VPTTNfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160529_EOM3_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We've looked at the polls, and we're taking the lead, but this race is still a virtual tie -- We've looked at the fundraising, and we're falling short of our $50,000 goal. With control of the Senate, the future of the Supreme Court, and electing a Senator who will fight for Granite State families on the line, we HAVE to hit our critical end-of-month fundraising goal or we risk poll numbers slipping away from us. "" This race is a statistical deadlock because Kelly Ayotte's corporate special interest allies have spent nearly $10 MILLION and they'll keep spending to make sure Maggie doesn't win. We don't need to match them dollar-for-dollar, but Maggie is relying on grassroots supporters to give what you can to push back. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Counting on you! Maggie for NH Polling Team ""

name: Lenee Kruse, RussFeingold.com
subject: FWD: Where we stand..
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
We have a big task ahead of us. | Friend, This line Russ wrote on Wednesday really stuck out to me:
> "[W]e're going to hit our goal of raising $50,000 online, and every dollar will be spent making sure Wisconsin voters know the truth about my campaign and Ron Johnson's record. _The only thing we need is you."_
**[We don't all have a million dollars to spend on one attack ad -- but, together, we can each pitch in to make sure our campaign can respond to the attacks against Russ. Like Russ said, we need you. Will you chip in $5 today to help us reach our $50,000 goal?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564973/1264713698/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564970/1264713698/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564971/1264713698/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496e/1264713698/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
We have a big task ahead of us in defeating Senator Johnson and his allies. I have no doubt that we can all come together to make it happen.
Thanks for doing your part,
Lenee Kruse
Finance Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Wed, May 25, 2016
Subject: Where we stand
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
Friend,
I wanted to give you an update on where we are. I've just wrapped up visiting all of Wisconsin's 72 counties twice. We've put over 40,000 miles on the campaign van and made 324 stops -- including 9 farms, 27 college campuses, and 34 coffee shops!
We're just getting started. In one week, I'm submitting my nomination signatures to officially be on the ballot in November. We're also unveiling our first-ever traveling Campaign HQ -- a 1989 Winnebago that'll be on the road for the next six months delivering yard signs, bumper stickers, and other campaign materials to voters across Wisconsin.
We have the momentum and we can win this, but only with your help. I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 online by May 31\. **[Will you join me by making a $5 contribution before the May 31 deadline?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")**
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
_Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_
| [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564973/1264713698/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564970/1264713698/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564971/1264713698/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496e/1264713698/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Meanwhile, the opposition is getting nervous. Last week, the Koch brothers announced they'll be spending $30 million on Senate ads this year. They've already run $3 million worth of ads against me, piling on along with my opponent and the other outside groups supporting his campaign. And you and I both know that's only the beginning.
**To date, these 10 groups have run ads against me:**
* National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC)
* The U.S. Chamber of Commerce
* Americans for Prosperity (a Koch-backed group)
* Freedom Partners
* Club for Growth
* Wisconsin Alliance for Reform
* Judicial Crisis Network
* America's PAC
* Restoration PAC
* Let America Work

That list might scare you, but it shouldn't intimidate you -- because we're going to hit our goal of raising $50,000 online, and every dollar will be spent making sure Wisconsin voters know the truth about my campaign and Senator Ron Johnson's record. _The only thing we need is you._
**[Help me take on Senator Johnson and the 10 outside groups supporting him. Make a $5 grassroots contribution to my campaign by the May 31 deadline.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")**
I'm proud of the campaign we're running. And I'll put my grassroots support against Senator Johnson's special interest money any time. Thank you for standing with me every step of the way.
Thanks for all that you're doing,
Russ
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/3564972/1264713698/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&refcode=ema_2016-05-29_may-eom3_nd-rs&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496f/1264713698/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496c/1264713698/VEsHDQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496d/1264713698/VEsHDA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42c5/1c469400/54157fd/356496a/1264713698/VEsEBQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

name: Ed Rendell
subject: Politics shouldn’t be this dirty
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6515964415987154944/-519298242286977024?refcode=e20160529.3&refcode2=e20160529.3nd&amount=25)
---
Friend -- I know that politics can be a dirty business. But I'm disappointed in what I've been seeing from Senator Pat Toomey's campaign.

Concerned that Democrat Katie McGinty has caught up with him in the polls, Sen. Toomey and his supporters' Super PACs have been viciously -- and falsely -- attacking her. An ad from Toomey's allies at the Club for Growth was even found false by non-partisan journalists at FactCheck.org.

**And now, Sen. Toomey 's latest ad attempts to mislead voters into believing that I support his campaign. That is simply not true -- I'm standing with Katie. And I refuse to let her be smeared by Republicans desperate to keep their hold on the Senate.**

[**Friend, will you stand with me and pitch in to help Katie fight back and win her election?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6515964415987154944/-519298242286977024?refcode=e20160529.3&refcode2=e20160529.3nd&amount=25)

As head of the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection during my administration, Katie had an exemplary record of helping Pennsylvania families and businesses. It pains me that Senator Toomey and his allies are trying to tarnish that record, while at the same time using my name to bolster his campaign.

**That 's just dishonest. But unless we fight back, they could very well get away with it. [That's why I'm asking you to donate whatever you can to Katie now. Will you pitch in?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6515964415987154944/-519298242286977024?refcode=e20160529.3&refcode2=e20160529.3nd&amount=25)**

Thank you,

Ed Rendell
Former Governor of Pennsylvania
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6515964415987154944/-519298242286977024?refcode=e20160529.3&refcode2=e20160529.3nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/6515964415987154944/-591355836324904960).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: When I file our FEC report, you should be on it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Make sure you're counted: | Friend --

There are just 2 days left until our next FEC fundraising deadline, which means those of us lucky enough to work for the campaign compliance team are hard at work preparing a report of who stepped up for Hillary this month. **[You should be a part of that! Chip in right now to make sure your contribution is included (and bonus -- we’ll send you a free sticker!).](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

These reports are always a big deal -- they’re how the world measures the strength of our campaign (along with vote totals, of course!). But this one is especially important, because it’s the last report we’ll file before primary voting concludes.

A lot of people will join this team after the primary is over -- you deserve credit for being on Hillary’s side early. **All it takes is $1 for your contribution to be part of our May fundraising report -- chip in before our critical end-of-month deadline, and let’s show the world how proud we are to stand with Hillary:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Nick

Nicholas Pancrazio
Chief Compliance Officer
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever.

Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Status:** Pending
**Suggested donation by 5/31 deadline:** $1

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2MDkwOTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0NDM0OTA5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mandi Karp
subject: DEVASTATING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ab/738133e4/36c08812/7f82763e/1077045698/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160529pm?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=pme160529pm_b_25")
---
| Hey, it's me again. I hate to bother you on a Sunday but I've been running the numbers and there's something you should know. Reality check:

We have 48 hours left to meet our critical end of month deadline. We still need to raise $38,475. With Marco Rubio reconsidering running for this seat, it would be DEVASTATING if we didn't get there. We could lose our chance here in Florida -- **and our chances of a Democratic Senate would disappear.**

We still have a shot. **But I need 50 people to take action IMMEDIATELY. What are you waiting for?
